file: 1332_Chen和Garwood - 1978 - Selective Hydrocracking of n-Paraffins in Jet Fuels.txt

experiments.description: 在高压微反应器中，使用Ni/H-毛沸石、Pt/Ca-A和Ni/RE-X催化剂，在加氢裂化条件下对喷气燃料中的正构烷烃进行选择性转化。实验研究了压力、氢分压和硫含量对反应选择性和产物凝固点的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: The experiments were conducted in a high-pressure microreactor capable of operating up to 3000 psig... selective hydrocracking of C10 to C16 n-paraffins present in kerosene type jet fuels over nickel/H-erionite and platinum/Ca-A catalysts.

Feedstock.original: Jet fuel (highly paraffinic, containing n-paraffins from C10 to C16)

Catalyst composition.original: NiO: 5.6 wt%, SiO2: 68.6 wt%, Al2O3: 16.5 wt%

Operation mode.value: Continuous flow in a high-pressure microreactor
Operation mode.original: Continuous flow in a high-pressure microreactor

Product Selectivity.original: n-paraffin converted: 42.3 wt%, non-normals converted: 10.2 wt%

Catalyst stability.value: Sensitive to hydrogen partial pressure and sulfur content; activity decreases with low hydrogen pressure or presence of sulfur
Catalyst stability.original: Sensitive to hydrogen partial pressure and sulfur content; activity decreases with low hydrogen pressure or presence of sulfur

experiments.experiment_description: 在高压微反应器中，使用Ni/H-毛沸石、Pt/Ca-A和Ni/RE-X催化剂，在加氢裂化条件下对喷气燃料中的正构烷烃进行选择性转化。实验研究了压力、氢分压和硫含量对反应选择性和产物凝固点的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: The experiments were conducted in a high-pressure microreactor capable of operating up to 3000 psig... selective hydrocracking of C10 to C16 n-paraffins present in kerosene type jet fuels over nickel/H-erionite and platinum/Ca-A catalysts.
